report.summary: Q2 opener community cycle: drafted 4 tweets (#246-249) including Q2 setup thread, KYA guide promo, Sui privacy promo, and SEC taxonomy quick hit. Newsletter v41 (Q2 edition) drafted. Discord/Telegram update prepared. 2 social card SVGs created. Market context: BTC $68,044, F&G 8, 54-day extreme fear streak.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #246 — Q2 2026 Setup Thread (6-tweet thread): Q1 scorecard, institutional accumulation, supply squeeze, Q2 catalysts, historical patterns, degen0x tools CTA. Scheduled Tue Apr 1 12PM ET.
Tweet #247 — Know Your Agent (KYA) guide promotion: AI agent identity on-chain, Digital Agent Passports, a16z framework. Scheduled Wed Apr 2 2PM ET.
Tweet #248 — Sui Private Transactions & Seal Framework: ZK-SNARK privacy, 866 TPS, compliant privacy model. Scheduled Thu Apr 3 11AM ET.
Tweet #249 — SEC Token Taxonomy quick hit: historic clarity after 10+ years, digital commodities/collectibles/tools/stablecoins/securities classification. Scheduled Fri Apr 4 10AM ET.

Newsletter v41 — Q2 Opener Edition: market pulse, regulation clarity section (SEC taxonomy, CLARITY Act, 401k guidance), new content (KYA + Sui guides), historical pattern analysis. Sending Thu Apr 3 10AM ET.
Discord/Telegram — Q2 kickoff update: market snapshot, what changed since Q1, new degen0x content. Scheduled Tue Apr 1 6PM ET.

sections.title: Social Cards Created
items: 2026-04-01-social-card-q2-setup.svg — 1200x630 OG card with Q1 scorecard, institutional accumulation stats, Q2 catalysts, and historical recovery pattern. Glass-morphism 3-panel layout.
2026-04-01-social-card-kya-agents.svg — 1200x630 OG card for KYA guide promotion. Features 5-layer KYA architecture diagram, Gartner 40% stat, and key players. Purple/cyan accent theme.

sections.title: Key Narratives Leveraged
items: Q1→Q2 transition: worst quarter since 2022 but institutional fundamentals stronger than ever. Price-sentiment divergence is the core narrative.
SEC token taxonomy: first-ever comprehensive classification — massive clarity catalyst. Used in tweet #249 and newsletter.
AI agents on-chain: KYA standard from a16z, 40% enterprise adoption projection. New content differentiator for degen0x.
Compliant privacy: Sui Seal Framework as the 'privacy + compliance' answer. Counter-narrative to privacy = illegal.
Historical patterns: every extended extreme fear period followed by triple-digit recovery. Recurring CTA for accumulation tools.
